root:
GetEnumFeature GetBoolFeature GetFloatFeature GetStringFeature GetIntFeature
GXSetEnumValueByString GXSetBoolValue GXSetFloatValue GXSetStringValue GXSetIntValue
GXGetEnumValue GXGetBoolValue GXGetFloatValue GXGetStringValue GXGetIntValue
Favorites 收藏夹 This category contains a list of features selected by the user. 该组节点包含用户添加的特征属性列表。 ICategory
Remote Device 设备配置信息
ICategory
Local Device 本地配置信息
ICategory
GrabTimeout 采集超时 Setting the maximum time to wait for a frame before generating an error. 设置生成错误之前等待帧的最长时间。 IInteger
Stream 流配置信息
ICategory
GevLinkSpeed 连接速度 This is a read only element. It indicates the connection speed in Mbps for the selected network interface. 只读项，显示选择网络接口的连接速度（以Mbps为单位）。 IInteger GX_INT_GEV_LINK_SPEED
DeviceInformation 设备信息 This category includes items that used to describe the device. 包含用于描述设备信息的参数。 ICategory
DeviceVendorName 厂商名称 This is a read only element. It is a text description that indicates the name of the device's vendor. 只读项，显示设备厂商的名称。 IString GX_STRING_DEVICE_VENDOR_NAME
DeviceModelName 设备型号 This is a read only element. It is a text description that indicates the model name of the device. 只读项，显示设备型号。 IString GX_STRING_DEVICE_MODEL_NAME
DeviceFirmwareVersion 设备固件版本 This is a read only element. It is a string that indicates the version of the device's firmware and software. 只读项，显示设备的固件版本号。 IString GX_STRING_DEVICE_FIRMWARE_VERSION
DeviceISPFirmwareVersion 设备ISP固件版本 This is a read only element. It is a string that indicates the version of the device's isp firmware and software. 只读项，显示设备的ISP固件版本号。 IString GX_STRING_DEVICE_ISP_FIRMWARE_VERSION
DeviceVersion 设备版本 This is a read only element. It is a string that indicates the version of the device. 只读项，显示设备版本号。 IString GX_STRING_DEVICE_VERSION
DeviceID 设备标识 Interface wide unique identifier of the selected device. 选定设备接口的唯一标识符。 IString
DeviceSerialNumber 设备序列号 This is a read only element. It is a string that provides a unique identifier for the device such as a serial number or a GUID. 只读项，以序列号或者GUID的形式为设备提供唯一标识符。 IString GX_STRING_DEVICE_SERIAL_NUMBER
DeviceHardwareVersion 设备硬件版本 This is a read only element. It is a string that indicates the version of the device's Hardware. 只读项，显示设备的硬件版本号。 IString
FactorySettingVersion 出厂参数版本 This is a read only element. It is a string that indicates the version of the device's Factory Setting. 只读项，显示设备的出厂版本号。 IString GX_STRING_FACTORY_SETTING_VERSION
DevicePHYVersion 设备网络芯片版本 This is a read only element. It is a string that indicates the version of the device's PHY. 只读项，显示设备的网络芯片版本。 IString GX_STRING_DEVICE_PHY_VERSION
DeviceUserID 用户自定义名称 This is a read/write element. It is a user programmable string. 该项可读可写，用户可以自己设定设备名称。 IString GX_STRING_DEVICE_USERID
DeviceType 设备类型 Identifies the transport layer technology of the device. 显示设备传输层技术类型。 IEnumeration
DeviceDisplayName 设备显示名称 User readable name of the device. 用户读取的设备名称。 IString
DeviceAccessStatus 设备权限状态 The access status the GenTL Producer has on the device. GenTL生产商在设备上的访问状态。 IEnumeration
GX_ACCESS_STATUS
0 GX_ACCESS_STATUS_UNKNOWN
1 GX_ACCESS_STATUS_READWRITE
2 GX_ACCESS_STATUS_READONLY
3 GX_ACCESS_STATUS_NOACCESS
DeviceChunkDataFormat 设备帧信息格式 Chunk data format used by the device. 设备使用的帧信息格式。 IEnumeration
DeviceEventDataFormat 设备事件数据格式 Enumeration,informing about the event data format used by the device. 描述设备使用的事件数据格式信息。 IEnumeration
GevDeviceIPAddress 设备IP地址 Current IP address of the GVCP interface of the selected device. 所选设备GVCP接口的当前IP地址。 IInteger
GevDeviceSubnetMask 设备子网掩码 Current subnet of the GVCP interface of the selected device. 所选设备GVCP接口的当前子网掩码。 IInteger
GevDeviceMACAddress 设备MAC地址 48-bit MAC address of the GVCP interface of the selected device. 所选择设备的GVCP接口的48位MAC地址。 IInteger
GevDeviceGateway 设备网关 Current gateway of the GVCP interface of the selected device. 所选择设备的GVCP接口的当前网关。 IInteger
GevEventsNumInList 链表中的事件个数
DeviceLinkSelector 设备链路选择 Selects which Link of the device to control. 选择控制的设备链路。 IInteger GX_INT_DEVICE_LINK_SELECTOR
DeviceLinkThroughputLimitMode 设备带宽限制模式 Controls if the DeviceLinkThroughputLimit is active. 控制设备带宽限制模式是否激活。 IEnumeration GX_ENUM_DEVICE_LINK_THROUGHPUT_LIMIT_MODE GX_DEVICE_LINK_THROUGHPUT_LIMIT_MODE_ENTRY
0 GX_DEVICE_LINK_THROUGHPUT_LIMIT_MODE_OFF
1 GX_DEVICE_LINK_THROUGHPUT_LIMIT_MODE_ON
DeviceLinkSelector
DeviceLinkThroughputLimit 设备链路带宽限制 Limits the maximum bandwidth of the data that will be streamed out by the device on the selected Link. 限制设备在选择链路上流式向外传输数据的的最大带宽。 IInteger GX_INT_DEVICE_LINK_THROUGHPUT_LIMIT DeviceLinkSelector
DeviceScanType 设备扫描方式 DeviceScanType. 设备扫描方式。 IEnumeration GX_ENUM_DEVICE_SCAN_TYPE GX_DEVICE_SCAN_TYPE_ENTRY
0 GX_DEVICE_AREA_SCAN
1 GX_DEVICE_LINE_SCAN
DeviceLinkCurrentThroughput 当前设备采集带宽 Limits the maximum bandwidth of the data that will be streamed out by the device on the selected Link. 限制设备在选择链路上流式向外传输数据的的最大带宽。 IInteger GX_INT_DEVICE_LINK_CURRENT_THROUGHPUT DeviceLinkSelector
ImageFormatControl 图像格式控制 This category includes items that used to control the size of the acquired image and the format of the transferred pixel data. 该组包含用于控制采集图像的大小和传输像素数据的格式的参数。 ICategory
ImageFormat 图像格式 This category includes items that used to control the size of the acquired image and the format of the transferred pixel data. 该组包含用于控制采集图像的大小和传输像素数据的格式的参数。 ICategory
SensorWidth 传感器宽度 This is a read only element. It is an integer that indicates the actual width of the camera's sensor in pixels. 只读项，以像素为单位显示相机传感器的实际宽度。 IInteger GX_INT_SENSOR_WIDTH
SensorSelector 传感器选择 Select the current sensor and view or set the corresponding properties. 选择当前传感器，可查看或设置相应属性。 IEnumeration GX_ENUM_SENSOR_SELECTOR GX_SENSOR_SELECTOR_ENTRY
0 GX_SENSOR_SELECTOR_CMOS1
1 GX_SENSOR_SELECTOR_CCD1
SensorHeight 传感器高度 This is a read only element. It is an integer that indicates the actual height of the camera's sensor in pixels. 只读项，以像素为单位显示相机传感器的实际高度。 IInteger GX_INT_SENSOR_HEIGHT
SensorDecimationHorizontal Sensor水平像素抽样 Sensor horizontal decimation factor. It specifies the extent of horizontal sub-sampling of the acquired frame, i.e. it defines how many pixel columns are left out of transmission. This has the net effect of reducing the horizontal resolution (width) of the image by the specified decimation factor. A value of 1 indicates that the camera performs no horizontal decimation. Sensor 水平像素抽样系数。该值指定了所采集帧的水平子采样的范围，即，它定义了有多少像素列没有传输。这将使图像的水平分辨率（宽度）减小指定的抽样因子。如果值为1表示相机不执行水平采样。 IInteger GX_INT_SENSOR_DECIMATION_HORIZONTAL
SensorDecimationVertical Sensor垂直像素抽样 Sensor vertical decimation factor. It specifies the extent of vertical sub-sampling of the acquired frame, i.e. it defines how many rows are left out of transmission. This has the net effect of reducing the vertical resolution (height) of the image by the specified decimation factor. A value of 1 indicates that the camera performs no vertical decimation. Sensor 垂直像素抽样系数。该值指定了所采集帧的垂直子采样的范围，即，它定义了有多少像素行没有传输。这将使图像的垂直分辨率（高度）减小指定的抽样因子。如果值为1表示相机不执行垂直采样。 IInteger GX_INT_SENSOR_DECIMATION_VERTICAL
WidthMax 最大宽度 This is a read only element. It is an integer that indicates maximum allowed width of the image in pixels taking into account any function that may limit the allowed width. 只读项，显示图像允许的最大宽度（以像素为单位）。该值考虑了可能限制最大宽度的所有功能。 IInteger GX_INT_WIDTH_MAX
HeightMax 最大高度 This is a read only element. It is an integer that indicates maximum allowed height of the image in pixels taking into account any function that may limit the allowed height. 只读项，显示图像允许的最大高度（以像素为单位）。该值考虑了可能限制最大高度的所有功能。 IInteger GX_INT_HEIGHT_MAX
OffsetX 水平偏移 This value sets the X offset (left offset) for the area of interest in pixels, i.e., the distance in pixels between the left side of the sensor and the left side of the image area. 该值以像素为单位设置感兴趣区域的X偏移（左偏移），即传感器左侧和图像区域左侧之间的距离（以像素为单位）。 IInteger GX_INT_OFFSET_X RegionSelector
OffsetY 垂直偏移 This value sets the Y offset (top offset) for the area of interest, i.e., the distance in pixels between the top of the sensor and the top of the image area. 该值设置感兴趣区域的Y偏移（顶部偏移），即传感器顶部和图像区域顶部之间的距离（以像素为单位）。 IInteger GX_INT_OFFSET_Y RegionSelector
Width 图像宽度 This value sets the width of the area of interest in pixels. 该值设置感兴趣区域的宽度（以像素为单位）。 IInteger GX_INT_WIDTH RegionSelector
Height 图像高度 This value sets the height of the area of interest in pixels. 该值设置感兴趣区域的高度（以像素为单位）。 IInteger GX_INT_HEIGHT RegionSelector
CenterWidth 窗口宽度
IInteger GX_INT_CENTER_WIDTH
CenterHeight 窗口高度
IInteger GX_INT_CENTER_HEIGHT
CurrentSensorWidth 当前传感器图像宽度 This value sets the current sensor image width (in pixels). 该值设置当前传感器图像宽度（以像素为单位）。 IInteger GX_INT_CURRENT_SENSOR_WIDTH
CurrentSensorHeight 当前传感器图像高度 This value sets the current sensor image height (in pixels). 该值设置当前传感器图像高度（以像素为单位）。 IInteger GX_INT_CURRENT_SENSOR_HEIGHT
CurrentSensorWidthMax 当前传感器最大宽度 This value is the current maximum sensor width (in pixels). 该值为当前传感器图像宽度最大值（以像素为单位）。 IInteger GX_INT_CURRENT_SENSOR_WIDTHMAX
CurrentSensorHeightMax 当前传感器最大高度 This value is the maximum value of the current sensor height (in pixels). 该值为当前传感器图像高度最大值（以像素为单位）。 IInteger GX_INT_CURRENT_SENSOR_HEIGHTMAX
CurrentSensorOffsetX 当前传感器水平偏移 This value sets the current sensor horizontal offset width (in pixels). 该值设置当前传感器水平偏移宽度（以像素为单位）。 IInteger GX_INT_CURRENT_SENSOR_OFFSETX
CurrentSensorOffsetY 当前传感器垂直偏移 This value sets the current sensor vertical offset width (in pixels). 该值设置当前传感器垂直偏移宽度（以像素为单位）。 IInteger GX_INT_CURRENT_SENSOR_OFFSETY
BinningHorizontal 水平像素Binning Setting the number of binned adjacent horizontal pixels. Their charges will be summed and reported out of the camera as a single pixel. 设置合并相邻水平像素的数目。它们的电荷将被汇总并通过相机报告为单个像素。 IInteger GX_INT_BINNING_HORIZONTAL
BinningVertical 垂直像素Binning Number of adjacent vertical pixels to be summed. Their charges will be summed and reported out of the camera as a single pixel. 需要求和的相邻垂直像素数量。它们的电荷将被汇总并通过相机报告为单个像素。 IInteger GX_INT_BINNING_VERTICAL
DecimationHorizontal 水平像素抽样 Horizontal decimation factor. It specifies the extent of horizontal sub-sampling of the acquired frame, i.e. it defines how many pixel columns are left out of transmission. This has the net effect of reducing the horizontal resolution (width) of the image by the specified decimation factor. A value of 1 indicates that the camera performs no horizontal decimation. 水平像素抽样系数。该值指定了所采集帧的水平子采样的范围，即，它定义了有多少像素列没有传输。这将使图像的水平分辨率（宽度）减小指定的抽样因子。如果值为1表示相机不执行水平采样。 IInteger GX_INT_DECIMATION_HORIZONTAL
DecimationVertical 垂直像素抽样 Vertical decimation factor. It specifies the extent of vertical sub-sampling of the acquired frame, i.e. it defines how many rows are left out of transmission. This has the net effect of reducing the vertical resolution (height) of the image by the specified decimation factor. A value of 1 indicates that the camera performs no vertical decimation. 垂直像素抽样系数。该值指定了所采集帧的垂直子采样的范围，即，它定义了有多少像素行没有传输。这将使图像的垂直分辨率（高度）减小指定的抽样因子。如果值为1表示相机不执行垂直采样。 IInteger GX_INT_DECIMATION_VERTICAL
PixelSize 像素位深 This is a read only feature. This enumeration provides a list of values that indicate the depth of the pixel values in the acquired images in bits per pixel. This value will always be coherent with the pixel format setting. 只读项。该枚举项设置图像中的像素值的深度（以位/像素为单位）。该值将始终与像素格式设置一致。 IEnumeration GX_ENUM_PIXEL_SIZE GX_PIXEL_SIZE_ENTRY
8 GX_PIXEL_SIZE_BPP8
10 GX_PIXEL_SIZE_BPP10
12 GX_PIXEL_SIZE_BPP12
16 GX_PIXEL_SIZE_BPP16
24 GX_PIXEL_SIZE_BPP24
30 GX_PIXEL_SIZE_BPP30
32 GX_PIXEL_SIZE_BPP32
36 GX_PIXEL_SIZE_BPP36
48 GX_PIXEL_SIZE_BPP48
64 GX_PIXEL_SIZE_BPP64
PixelColorFilter Bayer格式 This is a read only feature. This enumeration provides a list of values that indicate the alignment of the camera's Bayer filter to the pixels in the acquired images. 只读项，该枚举项设置相机Bayer滤波器和采集图像像素的调整格式。 IEnumeration GX_ENUM_PIXEL_COLOR_FILTER GX_PIXEL_COLOR_FILTER_ENTRY
0 GX_COLOR_FILTER_NONE
1 GX_COLOR_FILTER_BAYER_RG
2 GX_COLOR_FILTER_BAYER_GB
3 GX_COLOR_FILTER_BAYER_GR
4 GX_COLOR_FILTER_BAYER_BG
PixelFormat 像素格式 This enumeration sets the format of the pixel data transmitted for acquired images. 该枚举项设置获取的图像传输的像素数据的格式。 IEnumeration GX_ENUM_PIXEL_FORMAT GX_PIXEL_FORMAT_ENTRY
0 GX_PIXEL_FORMAT_UNDEFINED
17301505 GX_PIXEL_FORMAT_MONO8
17301506 GX_PIXEL_FORMAT_MONO8_SIGNED
17825795 GX_PIXEL_FORMAT_MONO10
17825797 GX_PIXEL_FORMAT_MONO12
17825829 GX_PIXEL_FORMAT_MONO14
17825799 GX_PIXEL_FORMAT_MONO16
17301512 GX_PIXEL_FORMAT_BAYER_GR8
17301513 GX_PIXEL_FORMAT_BAYER_RG8
17301514 GX_PIXEL_FORMAT_BAYER_GB8
17301515 GX_PIXEL_FORMAT_BAYER_BG8
17825804 GX_PIXEL_FORMAT_BAYER_GR10
17825805 GX_PIXEL_FORMAT_BAYER_RG10
17825806 GX_PIXEL_FORMAT_BAYER_GB10
17825807 GX_PIXEL_FORMAT_BAYER_BG10
17825808 GX_PIXEL_FORMAT_BAYER_GR12
17825809 GX_PIXEL_FORMAT_BAYER_RG12
17825810 GX_PIXEL_FORMAT_BAYER_GB12
17825811 GX_PIXEL_FORMAT_BAYER_BG12
17825838 GX_PIXEL_FORMAT_BAYER_GR16
17825839 GX_PIXEL_FORMAT_BAYER_RG16
17825840 GX_PIXEL_FORMAT_BAYER_GB16
17825841 GX_PIXEL_FORMAT_BAYER_BG16
35127329 GX_PIXEL_FORMAT_RGB8_PLANAR
36700194 GX_PIXEL_FORMAT_RGB10_PLANAR
36700195 GX_PIXEL_FORMAT_RGB12_PLANAR
36700196 GX_PIXEL_FORMAT_RGB16_PLANAR
ReverseX 水平翻转 This feature is used to flip horizontally the image sent by the device. The ROI is applied after the flipping. 该功能用于水平翻转设备发送的图像。翻转后启用ROI。 IBoolean GX_BOOL_REVERSE_X
ReverseY 垂直翻转 This feature is used to flip vertically the image sent by the device. The ROI is applied after the flipping. 该功能用于垂直翻转设备发送的图像。翻转后启用ROI。 IBoolean GX_BOOL_REVERSE_Y
RegionSendMode ROI输出模式 Region Send Mode Selector. 选择ROI输出模式。 IEnumeration GX_ENUM_REGION_SEND_MODE GX_REGION_SEND_MODE
0 GX_REGION_SEND_SINGLE_ROI_MODE
1 GX_REGION_SEND_MULTI_ROI_MODE
RegionMode 区域开关 Controls if the selected Region of interest is active and streaming. 控制所选感兴趣区域是否处于活动状态并进行流式处理。 IEnumeration GX_ENUM_REGION_MODE GX_REGION_MODE RegionSelector
0 GX_REGION_MODE_OFF
1 GX_REGION_MODE_ON
RegionSelector 区域选择 Selects the Region of interest to control.The RegionSelector feature allows devices that are able to extract multiple regions out of an image, to configure the features of those individual regions independently. 选择要控制的感兴趣区域。该功能允许能够从图像中提取多个区域的设备独立配置这些单个区域。 IEnumeration GX_ENUM_RREGION_SELECTOR GX_REGION_SELECTOR_ENTRY RegionSendMode
0 GX_REGION_SELECTOR_REGION0
1 GX_REGION_SELECTOR_REGION1
2 GX_REGION_SELECTOR_REGION2
3 GX_REGION_SELECTOR_REGION3
4 GX_REGION_SELECTOR_REGION4
5 GX_REGION_SELECTOR_REGION5
6 GX_REGION_SELECTOR_REGION6
7 GX_REGION_SELECTOR_REGION7
TestPatternGeneratorSelector 测试图源选择 Selects which test pattern generator is controlled by the TestPattern feature. 选择由测试模式功能控制的测试模式生成器。 IEnumeration GX_ENUM_TEST_PATTERN_GENERATOR_SELECTOR GX_TEST_PATTERN_GENERATOR_SELECTOR_ENTRY
0 GX_TEST_PATTERN_GENERATOR_SELECTOR_SENSOR
1 GX_TEST_PATTERN_GENERATOR_SELECTOR_REGION0
TestPattern 测试图 This enumeration provides a list of the available test images. Selecting a test image from the list will enable the test image. 该枚举提供可用于测试的图像列表。从列表中选择测试图像将启用测试图像功能。 IEnumeration GX_ENUM_TEST_PATTERN GX_TEST_PATTERN_ENTRY
0 GX_ENUM_TEST_PATTERN_OFF
1 GX_ENUM_TEST_PATTERN_GRAY_FRAME_RAMP_MOVING
2 GX_ENUM_TEST_PATTERN_SLANT_LINE_MOVING
3 GX_ENUM_TEST_PATTERN_VERTICAL_LINE_MOVING
6 GX_ENUM_TEST_PATTERN_SLANT_LINE
TransportLayer 传输层 This category includes items that used to control the Transport layer. 该组包含用于控制传输层配置的项目。 ICategory
BinningSelector Binning选择 Selects which binning engine is controlled by the BinningHorizontal and BinningVertical features. 该枚举项设置控制水平Binning和垂直Binning的Binning引擎。 IEnumeration GX_ENUM_BINNING_SELECTOR GX_BINNING_SELECTOR_ENTRY
0 GX_BINNING_SELECTOR_REGION0
1 GX_BINNING_SELECTOR_SENSOR
BinningHorizontalMode 水平像素Binning模式 This enumeration sets the binning horizontal mode. 该枚举项设置水平合并模式。 IEnumeration GX_ENUM_BINNING_HORIZONTAL_MODE GX_BINNING_HORIZONTAL_MODE_ENTRY
0 GX_BINNING_HORIZONTAL_MODE_SUM
1 GX_BINNING_HORIZONTAL_MODE_AVERAGE
BinningVerticalMode 垂直像素Binning模式 This enumeration sets the binning vertical mode. 该枚举项设置垂直合并模式。 IEnumeration GX_ENUM_BINNING_VERTICAL_MODE GX_BINNING_VERTICAL_MODE_ENTRY
0 GX_BINNING_VERTICAL_MODE_SUM
1 GX_BINNING_VERTICAL_MODE_AVERAGE
AcquisitionControl 采集控制 This category includes items that used to set the image acquisition parameters and to start and stop acquisition. 该组包含用于设置图像采集参数和开采和停采的项。 ICategory
AcquisitionTrigger 采集控制 This category includes items that used to set the image acquisition parameters and to start and stop acquisition. 该组包含用于设置图像采集参数和开采和停采的项目。 ICategory
AcquisitionMode 采集模式 Used by application software to set the mode of acquisition. This feature indicates how image are sequenced out of the camera (continuously, single shot, multi-shot,...). 用于设置采集模式。此功能指示图像从相机采出的顺序（连续、单次拍摄、多次拍摄…）。 IEnumeration GX_ENUM_ACQUISITION_MODE GX_ACQUISITION_MODE_ENTRY
0 GX_ACQ_MODE_SINGLE_FRAME
1 GX_ACQ_MODE_MULITI_FRAME
2 GX_ACQ_MODE_CONTINUOUS
AcquisitionStart 开始采集 This command starts the acquisition of images. If the camera is set for single frame acquisition, it will start acquisition of one frame. If the camera is set for continuous frame acquisition, it will start continuous acquisition of frames. 此命令启动图像采集。如果相机设置为单帧采集，它将开始采集一帧。如果相机设置为连续帧采集，它将开始连续帧采集。 ICommand GX_COMMAND_ACQUISITION_START
AcquisitionStop 停止采集 If the camera is set for continuous image acquisition and acquisition has been started, this command stops the acquisition of images. 如果相机设置为连续图像采集，且采集已启动，则此命令将停止图像采集。 ICommand GX_COMMAND_ACQUISITION_STOP
AcquisitionAbort 终止采集
AcquisitionSpeedLevel 采集速度级别 Setting the speed level of acquiring image. The bigger the value, the greater the frame rate; The smaller the value, the smaller the frame rate. 设置获取图像的速度级别。值越大，帧速率越大；值越小，帧速率越小。 IInteger GX_INT_ACQUISITION_SPEED_LEVEL
AcquisitionFrameCount 多帧采集帧数 This value sets the number of frames acquired in the multiframe acquisition mode. 该值设置在多帧采集模式下采集的帧数。 IInteger GX_INT_ACQUISITION_FRAME_COUNT
TriggerSelector 触发类型选择 This enumeration selects the trigger type to configure. Once a trigger type has been selected, all changes to the trigger settings will be applied to the selected trigger. 此枚举选择要配置的触发器类型。选择触发器类型后，对触发器设置的所有更改都将应用于所选触发器。 IEnumeration GX_ENUM_TRIGGER_SELECTOR GX_TRIGGER_SELECTOR_ENTRY
1 GX_ENUM_TRIGGER_SELECTOR_FRAME_START
2 GX_ENUM_TRIGGER_SELECTOR_FRAME_BURST_START
TriggerMode 触发模式 This enumeration sets the trigger mode for the selected trigger. 此枚举设置所选触发器的触发器模式。 IEnumeration GX_ENUM_TRIGGER_MODE GX_TRIGGER_MODE_ENTRY
0 GX_TRIGGER_MODE_OFF
1 GX_TRIGGER_MODE_ON
TriggerSelector
TriggerSource 触发源 This enumeration sets the signal source for the selected trigger. 此枚举设置所选触发器的信号源。 IEnumeration GX_ENUM_TRIGGER_SOURCE GX_TRIGGER_SOURCE_ENTRY
0 GX_TRIGGER_SOURCE_SOFTWARE
1 GX_TRIGGER_SOURCE_LINE0

LineMode 引脚方向 This feature controls whether the physical Line is used to Input or Output a signal. When a Line supports input and output mode, the default state is Input to avoid possible electrical contention. Line Mode can take any of the following values: Input: The selected physical line is used to input an electrical signal. Output: The selected physical line is used to output an electrical signal. 该功能控制物理引脚用于输入还是输出信号。当引脚支持输入和输出模式时，默认状态为输入，以避免可能的竞争与冒险。引脚模式可以采用以下任何值：输入：所选物理引脚用于输入电信号。输出：选定的物理引脚用于输出电信号。 IEnumeration GX_ENUM_LINE_MODE GX_LINE_MODE_ENTRY
0 GX_ENUM_LINE_MODE_INPUT
1 GX_ENUM_LINE_MODE_OUTPUT

0 GX_GAIN_SELECTOR_ALL

0 GX_BLACKLEVEL_AUTO_OFF

2 GX_BLACKLEVEL_AUTO_ONCE

Once a black level control has been selected, all changes to the black level settings will be applied to the selected control. 该枚举项选择要配置的黑电平通道。一旦选择了某一黑电平通道，对黑电平通道所做的所有更改都将应用于所选控制。 IEnumeration GX_ENUM_BLACKLEVEL_SELECTOR GX_BLACKLEVEL_SELECTOR_ENTRY

BalanceWhiteAuto 自动白平衡 The automatic white balance is a two-step process: First, the Balance Ratio parameter values for red, green, and blue are each set to 1.0. Then, assuming a 'grey world' model, the Balance Ratio Abs parameter values are adjusted such that the average gray values for the 'red' and 'blue' pixels match the average gray value for the 'green' pixels. 自动白平衡是一个两步过程：首先，红色、绿色和蓝色的平衡比参数值均设置为1.0。然后，假设一个“灰度世界”模型，调节白平衡因子绝对值，使“红色”和“蓝色”像素的平均灰度值与“绿色”像素的平均灰度值匹配。 IEnumeration GX_ENUM_BALANCE_WHITE_AUTO GX_BALANCE_WHITE_AUTO_ENTRY
0 GX_BALANCE_WHITE_AUTO_OFF
1 GX_BALANCE_WHITE_AUTO_CONTINUOUS
2 GX_BALANCE_WHITE_AUTO_ONCE
BalanceRatioSelector 白平衡通道选择 This enumeration selects a balance ratio control to configuration. Once a balance ratio control has been selected, all changes to the balance ratio settings will be applied to the selected control. 该枚举项选择平衡通道控制进行配置。一旦选择了白平衡通道，对白平衡通道设置所做的所有更改都将应用于所选控制。 IEnumeration GX_ENUM_BALANCE_RATIO_SELECTOR GX_BALANCE_RATIO_SELECTOR_ENTRY
0 GX_BALANCE_RATIO_SELECTOR_RED
1 GX_BALANCE_RATIO_SELECTOR_GREEN
2 GX_BALANCE_RATIO_SELECTOR_BLUE
BalanceRatio 白平衡系数 This value sets the selected balance ratio control as a float value. 该值以浮点值的形式设置白平衡系数。 IFloat GX_FLOAT_BALANCE_RATIO BalanceRatioSelector

AutoGainMax 自动增益最大值 Setting up automatic gain range of maximum. When the gain is set to auto mode, this function works. 设置最大自动增益范围。当增益设置为自动模式时，此功能工作。 IFloat GX_FLOAT_AUTO_GAIN_MAX

AutoExposureTimeMin 自动曝光最小值 Setting up automatic exposure range of minimum. When the exposure is set to auto mode, this function works. 设置最小自动曝光范围。当曝光设置为自动模式时，此功能工作。 IFloat GX_FLOAT_AUTO_EXPOSURE_TIME_MIN
AutoShutterValueMax 自动曝光最大值 Setting up automatic shutter range of maximum. When the shutter is set to auto mode, this function works. 设置最大自动曝光范围。当曝光设置为自动模式时，此功能工作。 IInteger GX_INT_AUTO_SHUTTER_VALUEMAX
AutoExposureTimeMax 自动曝光最大值 Setting up automatic exposure range of maximum. When the exposure is set to auto mode, this function works. 设置最大自动曝光范围。当曝光设置为自动模式时，此功能工作。 IFloat GX_FLOAT_AUTO_EXPOSURE_TIME_MAX

AWBROIOffsetY 自动白平衡感兴趣区域Y坐标 This value sets the Y offset (top offset) for the rect of interest in pixels for Auto WhiteBalance. 该值以像素为单位设置自动白平衡感兴趣矩形的Y偏移量（顶部偏移量）。 IInteger GX_INT_AWBROI_OFFSETY

GevCurrentIPConfigurationLLA LLA方式配置IP Controls whether the link Local Address IP configuration scheme is activated on the given logical link. 控制是否在给定逻辑链路上激活链路本地地址IP配置方案。 IBoolean GX_BOOL_GEV_CURRENT_IPCONFIGURATION_LLA

(The last packet may be smaller because the packet size is not necessarily a multiple of the block size for the stream channel.) 此值设置所选流通道的数据包大小（以字节为单位）。不包括数据前导和数据尾。（由于数据包大小不一定是流通道数据块大小的倍数，最后一个数据包可能更小。） IInteger GX_INT_GEV_PACKETSIZE

UserSetSelector 参数组选择 This enumeration selects the configuration set to load, save or configure. Possible values for the User Set Selector are: Default: Selects a configuration set that contains factory settings. User Set 1: Selects the first user set. When the Default configuration set is selected and loaded using User Set Load, the device must be in default factory settings state and must make sure the mandatory continuous acquisition use case works directly. Default User Set is read-only and cannot be modified. 该枚举项选择要加载、保存或配置的配置组。用户组选择的可能值为：默认：选择包含出厂设置的配置组参数。用户组1：选择第一个用户组。当选择并使用用户设置加载默认参数组时，设备必须处于默认出厂设置状态，并且必须确保强制连续采集情况直接工作。默认用户集是只读的，不能修改。 IEnumeration GX_ENUM_USER_SET_SELECTOR GX_USER_SET_SELECTOR_ENTRY
0 GX_ENUM_USER_SET_SELECTOR_DEFAULT
1 GX_ENUM_USER_SET_SELECTOR_USERSET0
UserSetLoad 加载参数组 This command loads the selected configuration set from the non-volatile memory in the camera to the volatile memory and makes the selected set the active configuration set. Once the selected set is loaded, the parameters in the selected set will control the camera. 该命令将所选配置组从相机中的非易失性内存加载到易失性内存，并使所选组成为活动配置组。加载选定组后，选定组中的参数将控制相机。 ICommand GX_COMMAND_USER_SET_LOAD
UserSetSave 保存参数组 This command copies the parameters in the current active configuration set into the selected user set in the camera's non-volatile memory. 该命令将当前活动配置组中的参数复制到相机非易失性内存中选定的用户组。 ICommand GX_COMMAND_USER_SET_SAVE
UserSetDefault 启动参数组 This enumeration sets the configuration set to be used as the default startup set. The configuration set that has been selected as the default startup set will be loaded as the active set whenever the camera is powered on or reset. 该枚举将配置组设置为用作默认启动组。每当相机通电或重置时，已选择作为默认启动组的配置组将加载为活动组。 IEnumeration GX_ENUM_USER_SET_DEFAULT GX_USER_SET_DEFAULT_ENTRY
0 GX_ENUM_USER_SET_DEFAULT_DEFAULT
1 GX_ENUM_USER_SET_DEFAULT_USERSET0

HBlanking 水平消隐 Between line and line of the return process is referred to as horizontal blanking. 在将光信号转换为电信号的扫描过程中，扫描至行末后返回至下一行起始位置过程称为水平消隐。 IInteger GX_INT_H_BLANKING
VBlanking 垂直消隐 After scanning a frame, from the bottom right hand corner to return to the image of the upper left corner, start a new frame scanning, the time interval, called vertical blanking. 扫描点扫描完一帧后，要从图像的右下角返回到图像的左上角，开始新一帧的扫描，这一时间间隔，叫做垂直消隐。 IInteger GX_INT_V_BLANKING

Settings 设置 Grabbing Settings. 抓取设置。 ICategory

StreamMapedBufferCount 有效Buffer映射个数 Number of Maped (known) buffers on this stream. 流中映射的buffer数量。 IInteger

StreamDeliveredFrameCount 接收帧个数 Total number of delivered frames since last acquisition start. 自上次采集开始以来已传送的帧总数。 IInteger GX_DS_INT_DELIVERED_FRAME_COUNT
StreamLostFrameCount buffer不足导致的丢帧个数 Number of lost frames due to queue underrun.This number is initialized with zero at the time the stream is opened and incremented every time the data could not be acquired because there was no buffer in the input buffer pool. 由于队列欠载的丢帧个数。该值在流打开时初始化为零，在每次由于输入buffer池中没有buffer而无法获取数据时递增。 IInteger GX_DS_INT_LOST_FRAME_COUNT
StreamIncompleteFrameCount 接收的残帧个数 Number of incomplete frames due to lost packets. 丢包引起的残帧个数。 IInteger GX_DS_INT_INCOMPLETE_FRAME_COUNT
StreamContinuousBufferNum 使用连续物理内存Buffer数量 The number of buffers using continuous physical address. 使用连续物理地址的缓冲区数。 IInteger GX_DS_INT_CONTINUOUS_BUFFER_NUM
StreamNonContinuousBufferNum 使用非连续物理内存Buffer数量 The number of buffers using uncontinuous physical address. 使用不连续物理地址的缓冲区数。 IInteger GX_DS_INT_NON_CONTINUOUS_BUFFER_NUM
StreamMissingBlockIDCount BlockID丢失个数 Number of missing block ID. BlockID丢失个数。 IInteger GX_DS_INT_MISSING_BLOCKID_COUNT
StreamDeliveredPacketCount 接收到的包数 Number of delivered packets since last acquisition start. 自从上次采集开始接收到的包数。 IInteger GX_DS_INT_DELIVERED_PACKET_COUNT
StreamResendPacketCount 重传包个数 Number of resend packets since last acquisition start. 自从上次采集开始重传包个数。 IInteger GX_DS_INT_RESEND_PACKET_COUNT
StreamRescuedPacketCount 重传成功包个数 Number of resend successfully packets since last acquisition start. 自上次采集开始重传成功包个数。 IInteger GX_DS_INT_RESCUED_PACKED_COUNT

0 GX_DS_RESEND_MODE_OFF
1 GX_DS_RESEND_MODE_ON

0 GX_DS_MULTI_RESEND_MODE_OFF
1 GX_DS_MULTI_RESEND_MODE_ON
MaxPacketCountInOneBlock 数据块最大重传包数 Maximum number of packets in a block that can be missing and requested to resend. A value of zero indicates that there is no limit to the number of missing packets in a block. 数据块中可能丢失并请求重传的最大数据包数。值为零表示对块中丢失的数据包数量没有限制。 IInteger GX_DS_INT_MAX_PACKET_COUNT_IN_ONE_BLOCK
MaxPacketCountInOneCommand 一次重传命令最大包含的包数 This parameter defines the maximum number of packets that can be requested in one resend command. A value of zero indicates that there is no limit to the number of packets in one resend command. 该参数定义了一次重传命令中可以请求的最大数据包数。值为零表示在一次重传命令中不限制数据包的数量。 IInteger GX_DS_INT_MAX_PACKET_COUNT_IN_ONE_COMMAND
ResendTimeout 重传超时时间 Controls resend timeout in milliseconds. 控制重传超时时间（以毫秒为单位）。 IInteger GX_DS_INT_RESEND_TIMEOUT
MaxWaitPacketCount 最大等待包数 The maximum number of packets that arrive from the next block before forces the data receiver to stop waiting for packets from current block.A value of zero indicates that there is no limit to the number of packets that arrive from the next block. 在强制数据接收器停止等待来自当前块的数据包之前从下一个块到达的最大数据包数。值为零表示对从下一个块到达的数据包数没有限制。 IInteger GX_DS_INT_MAX_WAIT_PACKET_COUNT
BlockTimeout 数据块超时时间 Maximum time in milliseconds to receive all packets of an individual frame. 接收单个帧的所有数据包的最长时间（毫秒）。 IInteger GX_DS_INT_BLOCK_TIMEOUT
PacketTimeout 包超时时间 This parameter defines how long (in milliseconds) the driver will wait for the next expected packet before it sends a resend request to the camera. 该参数定义驱动程序在向相机发送重新发送请求之前等待下一个预期数据包的时间（毫秒）。 IInteger GX_DS_INT_PACKET_TIMEOUT
StreamTransferSize 传输数据块大小 the size of regular payload bulk transfers. 传输数据块大小。 IInteger GX_DS_INT_STREAM_TRANSFER_SIZE
StreamTransferNumberUrb 传输数据块数量 The maximum number of usb requests queued to the usb bus. 常规数据块批量传输的大小。 IInteger GX_DS_INT_STREAM_TRANSFER_NUMBER_URB
BandwidthReserve 预留带宽 Sets the percentage of the Ethernet bandwidth assigned to the camera to be held in reserve. The reserve is used for packet resends and control data transmissions. 设置分配给相机的以太网带宽保留的百分比。保留用于数据包重新发送和控制数据传输。 IInteger GevSCPD
StreamUnexpectedPacketDetail 异常包统计细分 Stream unexpected packet detail. 异常包统计细分。 ICategory
StatusUnavailablePacketCount 状态不可用包个数 Number of unexpected packet due to packet status unavailable. 状态不可用时异常包个数。 IInteger
SizeToolSmallPacketCount 长度过小的包个数 Number of unexpected packet due to size of the packet is less than the standard packet. 由于数据包小于标准数据包产生的异常包个数。 IInteger
InvalidHeader1PacketCount 包头信息无效1包个数 Number of unexpected packet due to the type of the packet is leader, but the Id of packet is not 0. 由于数据包的类型为leader但ID不为0而导致的异常包个数。 IInteger
InvalidHeader2PacketCount 包头信息无效2包个数 Number of unexpected packet due to the type of the packet is not leader, but the Id of packet is 0. 由于数据包的类型不为leader但ID为0而导致的异常包个数。 IInteger
BlockIDOutOfDatePacketCount BlockID过期的包个数 Number of unexpected packet due to the BlockID of the packet has Delivered to User.In other words,the packet comes too late. 由于数据包的BlockID已传给用户而导致的异常包数。也就是数据包过期。 IInteger
DuplicatePacketcount 重复包个数 Number of unexpected packet due to duplicate packet. 由于重复包产生的异常包个数。 IInteger
NoBufferLostPacketCount 缺少Buffer导致丢包个数 Number of lost packet due to buffer queue underrun. 由于Buffer队列欠载产生的丢包个数。 IInteger
StreamDataOverRunFrameCount OverRun个数 Number of Device is unable to send all data. 设备无法传输所有数据的个数。 IInteger
StreamDataSkipFrameCount Skip个数 Number of Transfers that are larger than the device requires. 大于设备要求的传输数。 IInteger
MaxNumQueueBuffer 采集队列最大Buffer个数
IInteger GX_DS_INT_MAX_NUM_QUEUE_BUFFER

SequencerControl 序列控制 This section describes in detail the features related to the Sequencer Control. 该组包含控制配置序列控制功能的项，该功能用于在相机中设置序列功能。 ICategory
SequencerMode 序列模式 Controls if the sequencer mechanism is active. 控制序列功能是否激活。 IEnumeration GX_ENUM_SEQUENCER_MODE GX_SEQUENCER_MODE_ENTRY
0 GX_SEQUENCER_MODE_OFF
1 GX_SEQUENCER_MODE_ON
SequencerConfigurationMode 序列配置模式 Controls if the sequencer configuration mode is active. 控制序列配置模式是否激活。 IEnumeration GX_ENUM_SEQUENCER_CONFIGURATION_MODE GX_SEQUENCER_CONFIGURATION_MODE_ENTRY
0 GX_SEQUENCER_CONFIGURATION_MODE_OFF
1 GX_SEQUENCER_CONFIGURATION_MODE_ON
SequencerSetSelector 序列组选择 Selects the sequencer set to which further feature settings applies. 选择将要进行设置的序列。 IInteger GX_INT_SEQUENCER_SET_SELECTOR
SequencerSetActive 当前生效序列 Contains the currently active sequencer set. 当前激活的序列。 IInteger GX_INT_SEQUENCER_SET_ACTIVE
SequencerPathSelector 序列路径选择 Selects to which branching path further path settings applies. 选择将要进行设置的分支路径。 IInteger GX_INT_SEQUENCER_PATH_SELECTOR
SequencerSetNext 跳转到序列 Specifies the next sequencer set. 指定设置下一个序列。 IInteger GX_INT_SEQUENCER_SET_NEXT
SequencerSetReset 重置序列 Sets sequencer to initial state. 将序列设置为初始状态。 ICommand GX_COMMAND_SEQUENCER_SET_RESET
SequencerTriggerSource 序列触发源 Specifies the internal signal or physical input line to use as the sequencer trigger source. 指定用作序列触发源的内部信号或外部触发信号。 IEnumeration GX_ENUM_SEQUENCER_TRIGGER_SOURCE GX_SEQUENCER_TRIGGER_SOURCE_ENTRY
7 GX_SEQUENCER_TRIGGER_SOURCE_FRAME_START
SequencerSetSave 保存序列 Saves the current device state to the sequencer set selected by the SequencerSetSelector. 保存当前设备状态到SequencerSetSelector选择的序列组。 ICommand GX_COMMAND_SEQUENCER_SET_SAVE
SequencerSetLoad 加载序列 Loads the sequencer set selected by SequencerSetSelector in the device. Even if SequencerMode is off, this will change the device state to the configuration of the selected set. 加载设备中SequencerSetSelector选择的序列组。即使SequencerMode关闭，这也会将设备状态更改为所选集的配置。 ICommand GX_COMMAND_SEQUENCER_SET_LOAD
SequencerFeatureEnable 序列功能使能 Enables the selected feature and make it active in all the sequencer sets. 启用所选特性，并使其在所有音序器集中处于活动状态。 IBoolean GX_BOOL_SEQUENCER_FEATURE_ENABLE
SequencerFeatureSelector 序列功能选择 Selects which sequencer features to control. 选择要控制的序列器功能。 IEnumeration GX_ENUM_SEQUENCER_FEATURE_SELECTOR GX_SEQUENCER_FEATURE_SELECTOR_ENTRY
0 GX_SEQUENCER_FEATURE_SELECTOR_FLAT_FIELD_CORRECTION
SequencerSetCount 序列参数组数 Sets effective number of sequencer set. 设置有效的音序器集数量。 IInteger GX_INT_SEQUENCER_SET_COUNT
ProductionCode 平台 ProductionCode. 平台 IString GX_STRING_PRODUCTION_CODE
DeviceOriginalName 原始名称 This is a read only element. It is a text description that indicates the Original name of the device. 这是一个只读元素。这是一个指示设备原始名称的文本描述。 IString GX_STRING_DEVICE_ORIGINAL_NAME
Revision CXP协议版本 The revision of the CoaXPress specification. CoaXPress规范的修订。 IInteger GX_INT_REVISION
VersionsSupported 支持的CXP协议版本 Provide the version(s) of the CoaXPress specification supported by the Device. 提供设备支持的CoaXPress规范的版本。 IInteger GX_INT_VERSIONS_SUPPORTED
VersionUsed 使用版本 Provide the version of the CoaXPress specification used to communicate between the Device and Host. 提供用于在设备和主机之间通信的CoaXPress规范的版本。 IInteger GX_INT_VERSION_USED
TECEnable TEC开关 Enable or disable the TEC cooling function. 开启/关闭TEC冷却功能。 IBoolean GX_BOOL_TEC_ENABLE
TECTargetTemperature 目标温度 Sets reference temperature for TEC cooling operation. 为TEC冷却操作设置参考温度。 IFloat GX_FLOAT_TEC_TARGET_TEMPERATURE
FanEnable 风扇开关 Turn on or off the fan. 打开或关闭风扇。 IBoolean GX_BOOL_FAN_ENABLE
FanSpeed 风扇转速 This value is the speed of the fan. 此值为风扇的转速。 IInteger GX_INT_FAN_SPEED
CounterValue 计数器值 Reads or writes the current value of the selected Counter. 读取或写入所选计数器的当前值。 IInteger GX_INT_COUNTER_VALUE
PGAGain PGA增益 The analog gain inside the Sensor. 传感器内部的模拟增益。 IFloat GX_FLOAT_PGA_GAIN

FFCROIHeight 平场校正感兴趣区域高度 ROI height of flat field correction. 平场校正感兴趣区域高度。 IInteger GX_INT_FFCROI_HEIGHT
FFCROIOffsetX 平场校正感兴趣区域水平偏移 ROT horizontal offset of flat field correction. 平场校正感兴趣区域水平偏移。 IInteger GX_INT_FFCROI_OFFSETX
FFCROIOffsetY 平场校正感兴趣区域垂直偏移 ROT vertical offset of flat field correction. 平场校正感兴趣区域垂直偏移。 IInteger GX_INT_FFCROI_OFFSETY

CoaXPress CoaXPress Category that contains the features pertaining to the CoaXPress transport layer of the device. 包含与设备的CoaXPress传输层相关的特性的类别。 ICategory
CxpLinkConfiguration 连接配置 This feature allows specifying the Link configuration for the communication between the Receiver and Transmitter Device. 此特性允许为接收设备和发送设备之间的通信指定链路配置。 IEnumeration GX_ENUM_CXP_LINK_CONFIGURATION GX_CXP_LINK_CONFIGURATION_ENTRY
0x00010048 GX_CXP_LINK_CONFIGURATION_CXP6_X1
0x00010058 GX_CXP_LINK_CONFIGURATION_CXP12_X1
0x00020048 GX_CXP_LINK_CONFIGURATION_CXP6_X2
0x00020058 GX_CXP_LINK_CONFIGURATION_CXP12_X2
0x00040048 GX_CXP_LINK_CONFIGURATION_CXP6_X4
0x00040058 GX_CXP_LINK_CONFIGURATION_CXP12_X4
0x00010038 GX_CXP_LINK_CONFIGURATION_CXP3_X1
0x00020038 GX_CXP_LINK_CONFIGURATION_CXP3_X2
0x00040038 GX_CXP_LINK_CONFIGURATION_CXP3_X4
CxpLinkConfigurationPreferred 预设连接配置 Provides the Link configuration that allows the Transmitter Device to operate in its default mode. 提供允许发送设备在其默认模式下运行的链路配置。 IEnumeration GX_ENUM_CXP_LINK_CONFIGURATION_PREFERRED GX_CXP_LINK_CONFIGURATION_PREFERRED_ENTRY
0x00040058 GX_CXP_LINK_CONFIGURATION_PREFERRED_CXP12_X4
CxpLinkConfigurationStatus CXP连接配置状态 This feature indicates the current and active Link configuration used by the Device. 此特性指示设备使用的当前和活动Link配置。 IEnumeration GX_ENUM_CXP_LINK_CONFIGURATION_STATUS GX_CXP_LINK_CONFIGURATION_STATUS_ENTRY
0x00010048 GX_CXP_LINK_CONFIGURATION_STATUS_CXP6_X1
0x00010058 GX_CXP_LINK_CONFIGURATION_STATUS_CXP12_X1

0x00020058 GX_CXP_LINK_CONFIGURATION_STATUS_CXP12_X2
0x00040048 GX_CXP_LINK_CONFIGURATION_STATUS_CXP6_X4
0x00040058 GX_CXP_LINK_CONFIGURATION_STATUS_CXP12_X4
0x00010038 GX_CXP_LINK_CONFIGURATION_STATUS_CXP3_X1
0x00020038 GX_CXP_LINK_CONFIGURATION_STATUS_CXP3_X2
0x00040038 GX_CXP_LINK_CONFIGURATION_STATUS_CXP3_X4
Image1StreamID 第一张图流ID Stream ID of the 1st image stream from the Device. Stream来自设备的第一个图像流的ID。 IInteger GX_INT_IMAGE1_STREAM_ID
CxpConnectionSelector 连接选择 Selects the CoaXPress physical connection to control. 选择要控件的CoaXPress物理连接。 IInteger GX_ENUM_CXP_CONNECTION_SELECTOR
CxpConnectionTestMode 连接测试模式 Enables the test mode for an individual physical connection of the Device. 为设备的单个物理连接启用测试模式。 IEnumeration GX_ENUM_CXP_CONNECTION_TEST_MODE GX_CXP_CONNECTION_TEST_MODE_ENTRY
0 GX_CXP_CONNECTION_TEST_MODE_OFF
1 GX_CXP_CONNECTION_TEST_MODE_MODE1
CxpConnectionTestErrorCount 连接测试错误计数 Reports the current connection error count for test packets recieved by the device on the connection selected by CxpConnectionSelector. 报告设备在CxpConnectionSelector选择的连接上接收到的测试数据包的当前连接错误计数。 IInteger GX_INT_CXP_CONNECTION_TEST_ERROR_COUNT
CxpConnectionTestPacketRxCount 连接测试数据包接收个数 Reports the current count for test packets recieved by the device on the connection selected by CxpConnectionSelector. 报告设备在CxpConnectionSelector选择的连接上接收到的测试数据包的当前计数。 IInteger GX_INT_CXP_CONNECTION_TEST_PACKET_RX_COUNT
CxpConnectionTestPacketTxCount 连接测试数据包发送个数 Reports the current count for test packets transmitted to the device on the connection selected by CxpConnectionSelector. 报告CxpConnectionSelector选择的连接上传输到设备的测试包的当前计数。 IInteger GX_INT_CXP_CONNECTION_TEST_PACKET_TX_COUNT
LutBlackThreshold 暗阈值 For pixel points whose image gray value is less than or equal to the dark threshold, all pixel values become 0. 图像灰度值小于等于暗阈值的像素点，像素值全部变为0 IInteger GX_INT_LUT_BLACK_THRESHOLD
LutWhiteThreshold 亮阈值 For pixel points whose image gray value is greater than or equal to the brightness threshold, all pixel values become 4095. 图像灰度值大于等于亮阈值的像素点，像素值全部变为4095 IInteger GX_INT_LUT_WHITE_THRESHOLD
LutReverse 灰度翻转开关 Image gray value flip switch, enabled gray value is 4095- current value. 图像灰度值翻转开关，使能后灰度值为4095-当前值 IBoolean GX_BOOL_LUT_REVERSE
Interface Control 采集卡配置信息
ICategory
InterfaceInformation 采集卡信息
ICategory
InterfaceID 采集卡标识 InterfaceID 采集卡标识 IString
InterfaceDisplayName 采集卡显示名称 InterfaceDisplayName 采集卡显示名称 IString
InterfaceType 采集卡类型 Identifies the transport layer technology of the interface. Corresponds to the INTERFACE_INFO_TLTYPE command of IFGetInfo function. 标识接口的传输层技术。对应于IFGetInfo函数的INTERFACE_INFO_TLTYPE命令。 IEnumeration
DeviceEnumeration 相机枚举
ICategory
DeviceUpdateList 更新相机列表 This command updates the internal device list of this interface. 此命令更新此接口的内部设备列表。 ICommand
DeviceSelector 相机选择 Selector for the different devices on this interface. 此接口上不同设备的选择。 IInteger
VendorName 厂商名称 This is a read only element. It is a text description that indicates the name of the device's vendor. 这是一个只读元素。它是一个文本描述，指示设备供应商的名称。 IString
ModelName 型号名称 This is a read only element. It is a text description that indicates the model name of the device. 这是一个只读元素。它是一个文本描述，指示设备的型号名称。 IString
SerialNumber 序列号 This is a read only element. It is a string that provides a unique identifier for the device such as a serial number or a GUID. 这是一个只读元素。它是为设备提供唯一标识符的字符串，例如序列号或GUID。 IString
FPGAVersion FPGA版本 Version of FPGA. FPGA版本 IString
HardwareRevision 硬件版本 Hardware Revision. 硬件版本 IString
FactoryFirmwareLoaded 出厂程序加载标识 Is FactoryFirmware Loaded. 出厂程序加载标识 IBoolean
InitFlag 初始化状态 Init Flag 初始化状态 IInteger
TestConnect 连接测试
ICategory
CXPLinkTestLine CXP连接测试选择 Selects the CoaXPress physical connection to control. 选择要执行连接测试的CoaXPress物理连接。 IEnumeration
CXPLinkTestMode CXP连接测试模式 Enables the test mode for an individual physical connection of the Host. 为主机的单个物理连接启用测试模式。 IEnumeration
TestPackageReceiveCount 测试包接收计数 Reports the current count for test packets received by the Host on the selected Host connection. 报告在所选连接上接收的测试数据包的当前计数。 IInteger
TestPackageReceiveErrCount 测试包接收错误计数 Reports the current count for test error packets sent by the Host on the selected Host connection during the Host to Device test. 报告主机到设备测试期间主机在选定连接上发送的测试错误数据包的当前计数。 IInteger
TestPackageSendCount 测试包发送计数 Reports the current count for test packets sent by the Host on the selected Host connection. 报告主机在所选主机连接上发送的测试数据包的当前计数。 IInteger
ClearTestPackageReceiveCount 清除测试包接收计数 Test packets received by the Host on the selected Host connection count reset. 主机在所选主机连接上接收的测试数据包计数重置。 ICommand
ClearTestPackageReceiveErrCount 清除测试包接收错误计数 Test error packets received by the Host on the selected Host connection count reset. 主机在所选主机连接上接收到的测试错误数据包计数重置。 ICommand
ClearTestPackageSendCount 清除测试包发送计数 Test packets sent by the Host on the selected Host connection count reset. 主机在所选主机连接上发送的测试数据包计数重置。 ICommand
TimerClockFrequency 定时器时钟频率 Reports the Frequency of the selected timer. 报告所选定时器的频率。 IInteger
TimerClockSource 定时器时钟源 Selects the source of the timer. 选择定时器时钟的来源。 IEnumeration
TimerDelay2 定时器延迟时间2 Sets the duration (in microseconds) of the delay to apply at the reception of a trigger before starting the Timer. 设置在启动定时器之前接收触发器时应用的延迟的持续时间（以微秒为单位）。 IFloat
TimerDuration2 定时器持续时间2 Sets the duration (in microseconds) of the Timer pulse. 设置定时器脉冲的持续时间（以微秒为单位）。 IFloat
TimerOutputInverter 定时器输出翻转 Sets whether the output of the timer should be inverted. 设置是否应反转计时器的输出。 IBoolean
TimerState 定时器状态 Sets the state of the specified timer. 设置指定定时器的状态。 IEnumeration
TimerTriggerMissed 定时器触发丢失计数使能 Sets whether to count the number of trigger pulses missed. 设置是否对错过的触发脉冲数进行计数。 IEnumeration
TimerTriggerOverlap 定时器触发交叠处理模式 Sets how to deal with a new trigger that occurs while the associated timer has not yet expired (both its delay and duration). 设置如何处理关联计时器尚未过期时发生的新触发器（包括其延迟和持续时间）。 IEnumeration
TimerTriggerDivider 定时器触发信号分频系数 Sets the frequency with which to accept trigger pulses. 设置接受触发脉冲的频率。 IInteger
TimerTriggerSoftware 定时器软触发 Issues a software trigger for the specified timer. 为指定的定时器发出软件触发器。 ICommand
TimerTriggerMissedCnt 定时器触发信号丢失计数 Trigger pulses missed count. 定时器触发丢失计数。 IInteger
TimerTriggerMissedCntReset 定时器触发信号丢失计数重置 Trigger pulses missed count reset. 定时器触发丢失计数重置。 ICommand
UserRegSelector 用户自定义寄存器选择 Specifies to control the main static-user-output register. 控制用户指定的寄存器。 IEnumeration
UserOutputValueALL 用户自定义寄存器值 Selector For specifying the static-user-output register. 设置用户指定的寄存器。 IInteger
LineFormat 引脚格式 Electrical style of the selected I/O line. I/O线路的电气类型。 IEnumeration
LineFilterDelay 引脚输入信号滤波 Delay introduced by the glitch removal filter of the selected I/O line. 所选I/O线路的故障消除滤波器引入的延迟。 IFloat
EncoderValueSource 编码器置-1触发源选择 Sets the signal source to use to set the rotary decoder's counter. 设置用于解码计数器的信号源。 IEnumeration
EncoderFrameEndPosition 得图时刻编码器位置 Inquires the value of the rotary decoder's counter at the end of the last grab. 查询获得图像的编码器位置。 IInteger
EncoderFrameEndRead 锁存得图位置源选择 Sets whether to enable the rotary decoder to store the counter value at the end of the last grab or frame interrupt. 设置是否启用旋转解码器在最后一次抓取或帧中断结束时存储计数器值。 IEnumeration
EncoderFrameEndPositionReset 得图位置锁存值复位 Reset the value of the rotary decoder's counter at the end of the last grab. 在最后一次抓取结束时重置旋转解码器计数器的值。 ICommand
EncoderMultiplier 编码器倍频系数 Inquires the multiplying factor applied to each increment/decrement of the rotary decoder's counter for every rotary encoder step.The multiplier is the power of the current node value of 2,for example:2^0\2^1\2^2...2^7. 查询适用于编码器每一步的解码器计数器的每一增量/减量的乘数。该乘数为2的当前节点值的次方，例2^0、2^1、2^2...2^7。 IInteger
EncoderOutputMode 编码器输出模式 Sets the rotary decoder's counter value and/or the direction of movement upon which the rotary decoder should output a pulse. 设置旋转解码器的计数器值和/或旋转解码器应输出脉冲的移动方向。 IEnumeration
EncoderPositionStartTrigger 编码器循环触发起始位置 Sets the rotary decoder's counter value upon which to start generating triggers. 设置旋转解码器的计数器值，根据该计数器值开始生成触发器。 IInteger
EncoderPositionTrigger 编码器固定位置触发值 Sets the rotary decoder's counter value upon which a trigger is generated. 设置旋转解码器的计数器值，在该计数器值上生成触发器。 IInteger
EncoderResetSource 编码器复位源 Sets the signal source to use to reset the rotary encoder's counter to 0 设置用于将旋转编码器的计数器重置为0的信号源 IEnumeration
CxpPocxpHostConnectionSelector PoCXP供电接口选择 Selects the CoaXPress physical connection for PoCXP control. 选择一个CoaXPress物理主机连接进行PoCXP控制。 IEnumeration
CxpPocxpAuto PoCXP供电自适应 Activate automatic control of the PoCXP. 激活PoCXP的自动控制。 ICommand
CxpPocxpTurnOff 关闭PoCXP供电 Disable PoCXP 禁用PoCXP ICommand
CxpPocxpTripReset PoCXP过流复位 Reset PoCXP after an over-current trip. PoCXP过流复位。 ICommand
CxpPocxpDetectionMode PoCXP检测模式 Selects the PoCXP detection mode. PoCXP检测模式。 IEnumeration
CxpPocxpConfigurationStatus PoCXP配置状态 Return PoCXP configuration 返回PoCXP配置 IEnumeration
CxpPocxpStatus PoCXP工作状态 Return PoCXP status. 返回PoCXP状态 IEnumeration
CxpPocxpCurrent PoCXP供电电流 Return the current delivered by the PoCXP Transmitter Unit on the selected connection. 返回PoCXP发送单元在选定连接上传递的电流。 IFloat
CxpPocxpVoltage PoCXP供电电压 Return the voltage measured at the output of the PoCXP Transmitter Unit on the selected connection. 返回在所选连接的PoCXP发送单元输出处测量的电压。 IFloat
CxpPocxpPowerInputStatus PoCXP电源输入状态 Return CoaXPress Power Input Status. 返回CoaXPress电源输入状态 IEnumeration
CxpHostConnectionCount 识别的物理连接数 CoaXPress Host Connection Count. CoaXPress主机连接数。 IInteger
CxpHostConnectionSelector CXP接口选择 Selects the CoaXPress physical connection. 选择CoaXPress物理连接。 IEnumeration
CxpConnectionState CXP连接状态 CoaXPress Connection State. CoaXPress连接状态。 IEnumeration
CxpDownConnectionSpeed CXP下行连接速度 CoaXPress Connection Speed. CoaXPress连接速度。 IEnumeration
CxpDeviceConnectionID CXP设备连接标识 CoaXPress Connection Topology Information. CoaXPress连接拓扑信息。 IEnumeration

ICategory

PCIeLinkSpeed8000MTpsSupported PCIE支持链路速度8000MTps Reports whether this interface supports PCIe Gen 3 transfer rate (8.0 GT/s). 报告接口是否支持PCIe Gen 3传输速率(8.0 GT/s)。 IBoolean

CxpDuplicatedCharactersUnCorrectedErrorCount 重复纠错失败错误计数 Reports the count of errors detected in duplicated characters that could not be decoded on the selected Host connection. 报告在所选主机连接上无法解码的重复字符中检测到的错误计数。 IInteger
CxpControlDataPacketlengthErrorCount 控制应答包包长错误包计数 Reports the count of length errors detected in control packets on the selected Host connection. 报告在所选主机连接上检测到的控制报文长度错误的次数。 IInteger

CxpEventPacketCrcErrorCount 事件包crc错误包计数 Reports the count of CRC errors detected in event packets on the selected Host connection. 报告所选主机连接上的事件包中检测到CRC错误的次数。 IInteger

CxpStreamDataPacketlengthErrorCount 流包包长错误包计数 Reports the count of length errors detected in stream data packets on the selected Host connection. 报告在所选主机连接上检测到的流数据包长度错误的计数。 IInteger

EyeAlarmInterruptCnt 眼图闭合次数 Reports the count of eye close alarm interrupt on the selected Host connection. 报告所选主机连接上的眼图闭合次数。 IInteger
LOLAlarmInterruptCnt phy失锁次数 Reports the count of phy loss of lock alarm interrupt on the selected Host connection. 报告所选主机连接上的phy失锁次数。 IInteger
LOSAlarmInterruptCnt 无输入次数 Reports the count of phy loss of signal alarm interrupt on the selected Host connection. 报告所选主机连接上的无输入次数。 IInteger
SendResendCmd1Count 首次重传发送个数计数 Reports the count of retransmission packets sent on the first retransmission. 报告所选主机连接上的首次重传发送个数计数。 IInteger
SendResendCmd2Count 二次重传发送个数计数 Reports the count of retransmission packets sent on the second retransmission. 报告所选主机连接上的二次重传发送个数计数。 IInteger
PauseTimeCount 暂停相机时间统计 Camera pause time statistics, in 3ns units. 报告所选主机连接上的暂停相机时间统计，3ns为单位。 IInteger
ReceiveResendGVSPCount 采集卡接收的相机发送的重传包计数 Reports the count of retransmission packets sent by the camera received by the capture card. 报告所选主机连接上的采集卡接收的相机发送的重传包计数。 IInteger
ReceiveResendUnvaildGVSPCount 采集卡接收的相机发送的重传不可见包计数 Reports the count of retransmitted invisible packets sent by the camera received by the capture card. 报告所选主机连接上的采集卡接收的相机发送的重传不可见包计数。 IInteger

BufOverflowCount 帧存溢出事件计数 Reports the count of Reports the count of frame store overflow events. 报告所选主机连接上的帧存溢出事件计数。 IInteger
ResendTimeoutCount 重传包超时没返回计数 Reports the count of retransmission packet timeout and not returned. 报告所选主机连接上的重传包超时没返回计数。 IInteger
FBWriteFIFOFullCount 写缓存fifo溢出计数 Reports the count of Write FIFO overflow events. 报告所选主机连接上的写缓存fifo溢出计数。 IInteger

ReceiveResendGVSPCountReset 采集卡接收的相机发送的重传包计数重置 Retransmission packets sent by the camera received by the capture card count Reset. 采集卡接收的相机发送的重传包计数复位。 ICommand

InterfaceDescription 采集卡描述 Description of the interface. 接口的描述信息。 IString

BayerConversion Bayer转换 Sets whether to perform a Bayer color conversion, using your digitizer 设置是否使用数字化仪执行拜耳颜色转换 IEnumeration
OutPixelFormat 输出像素格式 Pixel format output by the acquisition card 采集卡输出的像素格式 IEnumeration
GVSPPacketSize 相机流通道包长 Set camera gvsp packet size after start acquistion. 开采时设置相机流通道包长为所选值大小。 IEnumeration
BayerMethod Bayer转换算法 Set method to do BayerConversion. 设置算法以进行Bayer转换。 IEnumeration
UnpackingMode 字节对齐模式 Set method to unpacking data 设置字节对齐模式 IEnumeration
RedBlueSwap 红蓝转换 Whether to convert RedBlueSwap 是否进行红蓝转换 IEnumeration
OutputReverseY 输出垂直翻转 This feature is used to flip vertically the image sent by the device. The ROI is applied after the flipping. 该功能用于垂直翻转设备发送的图像。翻转后启用ROI。 IBoolean
OutputPayloadSize 输出数据大小 Size of images, in bytes, for the current format and size. 当前格式和大小的图像大小（以字节为单位）。 IInteger
OutputWidth 输出图像宽度 This value sets the width of the area of interest in pixels. 该值设置感兴趣区域的宽度（以像素为单位）。 IInteger
OutputHeight 输出图像高度 This value sets the height of the area of interest in pixels. 该值设置感兴趣区域的高度（以像素为单位）。 IInteger
OutputPixelSize 输出像素位深 This is a read only feature. This enumeration provides a list of values that indicate the depth of the pixel values in the acquired images in bits per pixel. This value will always be coherent with the pixel format setting. 只读项。该枚举项设置图像中的像素值的深度（以位/像素为单位）。该值将始终与像素格式设置一致。 IEnumeration
InPixelFormat 输入像素格式 Pixel format input by the acquisition cam 相机输入的像素格式 IEnumeration

ExposureDelayLineSelector 曝光延迟选择 Specifies the delay in microseconds to apply after the FrameStart event before starting the ExposureStart event. 指定在启动ExposureStart事件之前，在FrameStart事件之后应用的延迟（以微秒为单位）。 IEnumeration
SensorTDIMode 传感器TDI模式 Selects how to combine the rows for TDI processing. 选择如何组合行进行处理。 IEnumeration
TDIStages TDI处理阶段 Selects the number of rows to sum/average in TDI. 选择TDI中要求和/求平均值的行数。 IEnumeration Category relating to flat field
IOControl IO控制 Category relating to camera Input and Output signals. 包含相机输入和输出信号相关的类别。 ICategory
AdvancedProcessingControl 高级处理控制 Category of features related to image processing. 包含图像处理相关的属性类别。 ICategory
FlatFieldCorrectionControl 平场校正控制 Category relating to flat field. 包含平场相关的属性类型。 ICategory
ColorProcessingControl 图像处理 Category of features related to color image processing. 包含图像处理相关的属性类别。 ICategory
FlatFieldCorrectionMode 平场校正模式 Sets the mode for the flatfield correction. 设置平场校正的模式。 IEnumeration
FlatFieldCorrectionCurrentActiveSet 平场校正参数组 Specifies the current set of flatfield coefficients to use. 设置当前激活的平场校正参数组。 IEnumeration
FlatFieldCorrectionType 平场校正类型 Specifies the flatfield correction type. 设置平场校正类型。 IEnumeration
FlatFieldCorrectionAlgorithm 平场校正算法 Specifies the flatfield correction algorithm to use. 设置平场校正算法。 IEnumeration
FlatFieldCalibrationAlgorithm 平场标定算法 Specifies the flatfield calibration algorithm to use. 设置平场校正标定算法。 IEnumeration
FlatFieldCalibrationTarget 平场标定目标灰度值 Sets the target pixel value for the gain (PRNU) calibration. 设置增益（PRNU）校准的目标像素值。 IInteger
FlatFieldCalibrationSampleSize 平场标定block大小 Set flatfield calibration sample size (number of lines to sum). 设置平场标定样本大小（要求和的行数）。 IEnumeration
FlatFieldCalibrationRowSelector 平场标定行数选择 Selection of number of calibration lines for flatfield calibration. 选择平场标定的行数。 IEnumeration
FlatFieldCalibrationOffsetX 平场标定X坐标偏移 Set flatfield calibration ROI X coordinate offset. 设置平场标定的ROI X坐标偏移。 IInteger
FlatFieldCalibrationWidth 平场标定宽度 Set flatfield calibration ROI width. 设置平场标定ROI宽度。 IInteger
CalibrateFPN 标定FPN Performs Fixed Pattern Noise (FPN) calibration by reducing to zero dark pixel current using a pixel offset. 通过使用像素偏移将暗像素电流减小到零来执行固定模式噪声（FPN）校准。 ICommand
CalibratePRNU 标定PRNU Performs Photo Response Non Uniformity (PRNU) calibration to a targeted, user-defined value. PRNU calibration eliminates the difference in responsivity between the most and least sensitive pixel, creating a uniform response to light. 将图像响应非均匀性（PRNU）校准到目标用户定义值。PRNU校准消除了最敏感像素和最不敏感像素之间的响应度差异，从而对光产生均匀的响应。 ICommand
SaveCalibration 保存标定参数 Save the calibration performed by CalibrateFPN and CalibratePRNU to the active set. 将CalibrateFPN和CalibratePRNU执行的标定保存到参数组。 ICommand
ResetCoefficients 复位参数 Reset all FFC coefficients to pass-through. 重置所有的平场校正参数。 ICommand
FlatFieldCorrectionRowSelector 平场校正行选择 Selects which row/color's correction gain/offset value is displayed. 选择显示行校正增益/偏移值。 IEnumeration
FlatFieldCorrectionPixelXCoordinate 平场校正系数坐标选择 Specifies the X coordinate of the flatfield pixel coefficient to access. 指定要访问的平场像素系数的X坐标。 IInteger
FlatFieldCorrectionGain 平场校正增益系数 Sets the gain to apply to the currently selected pixel. 设置应用于当前选定像素的增益。。 IFloat
FlatFieldCorrectionOffset 平场校正偏移系数 Sets the offset to apply to the currently selected pixel. 设置应用于当前选定像素的偏移。 IInteger
InputLineDetectionLevel 输入引脚检测标准 Specifies the voltage threshold required to recognize a signal transition on an input line. 指定引脚的信号转换所需的电压阈值。 IEnumeration
InputLineFallingEdgeDebouncingPeriod 输入引脚下降沿滤波 Specifies the minimum delay before an input line voltage transition is recognized as a falling signal transition. 指定输入线电压转换被识别为下降信号转换之前的最小延迟。 IInteger
InputLineRisingEdgeDebouncingPeriod 输入引脚上升沿滤波 Specifies the minimum delay before an input line voltage transition is recognized as a rising signal transition. 指定输入线电压转换被识别为上升信号转换之前的最小延迟。 IInteger
LineElectricalTermination 引脚终端匹配电阻 Controls if the electrical termination of Input Line is enabled of disabled. 控制输入线路的电气端接是启用还是禁用。 IBoolean
OutputLinePluseSignalActivation 输出引脚信号极性 Specifies the input line activation mode to trigger the OutputLine pulse. 指定输入引脚激活模式以触发OutputLine脉冲。 IEnumeration
OutputLinePulseDelay 输出引脚脉冲延迟 Sets the delay, in microseconds, before the output line pulse duration signal. Applicable for the LineSource feature. 设置输出引脚脉冲持续时间信号之前的延迟（以微秒为单位）。适用于LineSource功能。 IInteger
OutputLinePulseDuration 输出引脚脉冲宽度 Sets the width (duration) of the output line pulse in microseconds. 设置输出引脚脉冲的宽度（持续时间），单位为微秒。。 IInteger
TimerReset 定时器复位 Does a software reset of the selected timer and starts it. The timer starts immediately after the reset unless a timer trigger is active. 对所选计时器进行软件重置并启动。重置后，计时器立即启动，除非计时器触发器处于活动状态。 ICommand
TimerValue 定时器值 Reads or writes the current value (in microseconds) of the selected Timer. 读取或写入所选计时器的当前值（以微秒为单位）。 IFloat
TimerTriggerActivation 定时器值 Selects the activation mode of the trigger to start the Timer. 选择触发器的激活模式以启动计时器。 IFloat
CounterEventActivation 计数器触发极性 Selects the Activation mode Event Source signal. 选择计数器触发极性。 IEnumeration
CounterValue 计数器值 Reads or writes the current value of the selected Counter. 读取或写入所选计数器的当前值。 IInteger
CounterValueAtReset 复位时计数器值 Reads the value of the selected Counter when it was reset by a trigger or by an explicit CounterReset command. 计数器复位时，获取当前计数器值。 IInteger
CounterDuration 计数器事件激活 Sets the duration (or number of events) before the CounterEnd event is generated. 设置生成CounterEnd事件之前的持续时间（或事件数）。 IInteger
EncoderPreDivider 编码器预除器 The input source signal is first processed by a pre divider, which divides it by a set integer to reduce the frequency of the source signal. The processed signal is then sent to a multiplier. 输入的源信号最先进行预除器处理，通过设置的整数整除，达到降低源信号频率的目的，并将处理后的信号送到乘法器。 IInteger
EncoderPosition 编码器位置 Display the position between Input Src A and B. 显示旋转编码器输入A相和B相的相对位置。 IEnumeration
EncoderCounterMode 编码器计数器模式 Set encoder counter mode. 设置编码器计数器模式。 IEnumeration
EncoderCounter 编码器计数器 This is a read only element. Display encoder counter. 此节点只读。显示编码器计数器。 IInteger
EncoderCounterMax 编码器计数器最大值 Set encoder counter max. 设置编码器计数器最大值。 IInteger
EncoderCounterReset 编码器计数器复位 Manually reset the value of the "EncoderCounter" parameter using the "EncoderCounterReset" command. 使用"EncoderCounterReset"命令手动清零"EncoderCounter"参数的数值。 ICommand
EncoderMaxReverseCounter 编码器反向计数器最大值 Set the maximum value of the encoder reverse counter. 设置编码器反向计数器最大值。 IInteger
EncoderReverseCounterReset 编码器反向计数器复位 Manually reset the value of the "EncoderMaxReverseCounter" parameter using the "EncoderReverseCounterReset" command. 使用"EncoderReverseCounterReset"命令手动清零"EncoderMaxReverseCounter"参数的数值。 ICommand
EventFrameEndData 帧结束事件
ICategory
EventFrameEnd 帧结束事件ID This enumeration value indicates the FrameEnd event. 此枚举值表示FrameEnd事件。 IInteger
EventFrameEndTimestamp 帧结束事件时间戳 Indicates the time stamp of the FrameEnd event. 显示帧结束事件时间戳。 IInteger
